message: fix(writing/slack-mattermost): re-add the helper component the install section relies on Restores the `Code({ children })` helper function that was removed in `de-slopify pass 4` after the prior pass had removed every call site. The subsequent `feat(writing/slack- mattermost): add Install section near top of article` commit re-introduced two `{...}` blocks (the `jsm install` and `claude plugins install` snippets) but forgot to re-add the helper definition. Without it, the component fails to compile with `Code is not defined`. Pure restoration — verbatim copy of the helper as it appeared before pass 4. Co-Authored-By: Claude
